name: Ironhold Castle
description: The seat of the Ironheart dynasty, a colossal fortress of blacksteel and volcanic stone that looms over the city like a clenched fist. Its deepest vaults are said to contain weapons from the Sundering War, sealed behind doors that no living smith can open.

properties.builtBy: King Vorn Ironheart, first of his name
properties.floors: Seven above ground, unknown number below
properties.secretPassages: Rumored to connect to every noble house in the city
